query:
SELECT digest, size, last_accessed
            FROM "blob" b
            WHERE b.last_accessed < strftime('%s', 'now', '-1 day')
            AND NOT EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM "repo_blob_assoc" rba
                    WHERE rba.blob_digest = b.digest
                    AND rba.repo_name NOT LIKE 'f/%'
                )
            ORDER BY b.last_accessed DESC
            LIMIT 500;
